title: Version Control Strategies for Quantum Projects
description: Learn specialized version control practices for quantum software, including managing circuit definitions, parameter histories, calibration data, and experiment reproducibility across classical and quantum components.
learningObjectives: Structure quantum project repositories for effective collaboration and version tracking
Implement versioning strategies for quantum circuits, parameters, and calibration data
Use Git branches and tags to manage quantum experiment lifecycles
Track and reproduce quantum experiments with full provenance
Handle large binary files and simulation results with Git LFS
Implement semantic versioning for quantum libraries and applications
